examples: After finishing the classics, you can read sophistic books.
Finally, I compared sophistic theory with the philosophy after it, and then pointed out its advantages and disadvantages.
Through a study on the "sophistic propositions" of the pre-Qin School of Names, represented by "White dog is black", this paper proposes that these propositions are rationalistic in nature.
This is the kind of absurd, sophistic reasoning that could lead the EPA to regulate outdoor trash can lids as a pesticide because they deter or mitigate a "pest"--namely, raccoons.
